items.speaker: Chloe
items.text: Thank you, Cantarella, for everything you've done for us for all these years.

items.speaker: Chloe
items.text: Now that we're leaving, you'll be left alone here…

items.speaker: Chloe
items.text: You should never have had to bear such a heavy burden.

items.speaker: Chloe
items.text: I still remember what you told me back then, during the trials. You said you wanted to leave this place behind, go somewhere far away where no one knew you, and live freely...

items.speaker: Chloe
items.text: But now, you're staying in this cold castle, bearing it all alone…

items.speaker: Cantarella
items.text: As long as I am the head of Fisalia, what happened here remains buried. No more trials, no more innocent lives caught in this web.

items.speaker: Cantarella
items.text: My freedom for theirs—a fair exchange, wouldn't you say?

items.speaker: Cantarella
items.text: It's time to leave, my dear.
